code: export class HotRoomsListParser{constructor(){this._rooms=[];}flush(){this._rooms=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;this._rooms=[];const count=wrapper.readInt();for(let i=0;i<count;i++){const virtualRoomId=wrapper.readInt();const name=wrapper.readString();const userCount=wrapper.readInt();this._rooms.push({virtualRoomId,name,userCount});}return true;}get rooms(){return this._rooms;}}
